176: 
177: def _build_skinning_summary(weights: np.ndarray, normalized_joint_positions: np.ndarray) -> dict[str, np.ndarray]:
178:     weights = np.asarray(weights, dtype=np.float32)
179:     normalized_joint_positions = np.asarray(normalized_joint_positions, dtype=np.float32)
180:     if weights.ndim != 2:
181:         raise ValueError(f"weights must have shape [V, J], got {weights.shape}")
182:     if normalized_joint_positions.ndim != 2 or normalized_joint_positions.shape[1] != 3:
183:         raise ValueError(
184:             f"normalized_joint_positions must have shape [J, 3], got {normalized_joint_positions.shape}"
185:         )
186:     if weights.shape[1] != normalized_joint_positions.shape[0]:
187:         raise ValueError(
188:             f"weights joint dimension {weights.shape[1]} does not match joint positions "
189:             f"{normalized_joint_positions.shape[0]}"
190:         )
191: 
192:     weighted_joint_centroid = (weights @ normalized_joint_positions).astype(np.float32)
193:     sorted_weights = np.sort(weights, axis=1)
194:     top1 = sorted_weights[:, -1]
195:     top2 = sorted_weights[:, -2] if sorted_weights.shape[1] >= 2 else np.zeros_like(top1)
196:     entropy = -np.sum(weights * np.log(np.clip(weights, 1e-8, None)), axis=1)
197:     entropy = entropy / float(np.log(max(2, weights.shape[1])))
198:     summary = np.concatenate(
199:         [
200:             weighted_joint_centroid,
201:             top1[:, None].astype(np.float32),
202:             top2[:, None].astype(np.float32),
203:             entropy[:, None].astype(np.float32),
204:         ],
205:         axis=1,
206:     ).astype(np.float32)
207:     return {
208:         "summary": summary,
209:         "weighted_joint_centroid": weighted_joint_centroid.astype(np.float32),
210:         "top1_weight": top1.astype(np.float32),
211:         "top2_weight": top2.astype(np.float32),
212:         "weight_entropy": entropy.astype(np.float32),
213:     }
214: 
215: 
216: def compute_vertex_normals(vertices: np.ndarray, faces: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray:
217:     vertices = np.asarray(vertices, dtype=np.float32)
218:     faces = np.asarray(faces, dtype=np.int32)
219:     normals = np.zeros_like(vertices, dtype=np.float32)
220:     triangles = vertices[faces]
221:     face_normals = np.cross(
222:         triangles[:, 1] - triangles[:, 0],
223:         triangles[:, 2] - triangles[:, 0],
224:     ).astype(np.float32)
225:     for corner_idx in range(3):
226:         np.add.at(normals, faces[:, corner_idx], face_normals)
227:     return _safe_normalize(normals).astype(np.float32)
228: 
229: 
230: def build_smplx_vertex_features(
231:     model_path: str | Path,
232:     betas: np.ndarray,
233:     expression: np.ndarray | None = None,
234:     expression_start: int = 300,
235:     vertex_id_dim: int = DEFAULT_VERTEX_ID_EMBED_DIM,
236:     body_part_dim: int = DEFAULT_BODY_PART_EMBED_DIM,
237:     body_part_count: int = DEFAULT_BODY_PART_COUNT,
238: ) -> dict[str, np.ndarray | tuple[str, ...]]:
239:     model = load_smplx_model(model_path)
240:     betas = np.asarray(betas, dtype=np.float32).reshape(-1)
241:     expression = (
242:         np.zeros((0,), dtype=np.float32)
243:         if expression is None
244:         else np.asarray(expression, dtype=np.float32).reshape(-1)
245:     )
246: 
247:     rest_vertices = model["v_template"].copy()
248:     rest_vertices += _blend_shape_slice(model["shapedirs"], betas, start=0)
249:     rest_vertices += _blend_shape_slice(model["shapedirs"], expression, start=int(expression_start))
250:     rest_vertices = rest_vertices.astype(np.float32)
251: 
252:     centered_vertices = rest_vertices - rest_vertices.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True)
253:     scale = float(np.linalg.norm(centered_vertices, axis=1).max())
254:     if not np.isfinite(scale) or scale < 1e-8:
255:         scale = 1.0
256:     normalized_vertices = centered_vertices / scale
257:     vertex_normals = compute_vertex_normals(rest_vertices, model["faces"])
258:     joints = (model["J_regressor"] @ rest_vertices).astype(np.float32)
259:     normalized_joints = ((joints - rest_vertices.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True)) / scale).astype(np.float32)
260:     weights = np.asarray(model["weights"], dtype=np.float32)
261:     dominant_joint_ids = np.argmax(weights, axis=1).astype(np.int64)
262: 
263:     vertex_id_embedding = _build_vertex_id_embedding(num_vertices=rest_vertices.shape[0], dim=vertex_id_dim)
264:     body_part_embedding, vertex_body_part_ids, joint_body_part_ids = _build_body_part_embedding(
265:         dominant_joint_ids=dominant_joint_ids,
266:         normalized_joint_positions=normalized_joints,
267:         dim=body_part_dim,
268:         body_part_count=body_part_count,
269:     )
270:     skinning_summary = _build_skinning_summary(weights=weights, normalized_joint_positions=normalized_joints)
271:     static_channel_names = get_smplx_vertex_feature_channel_names(
272:         vertex_id_dim=vertex_id_dim,
273:         body_part_dim=body_part_dim,
274:     )
275:     static_vertex_features = np.concatenate(
276:         [
277:             normalized_vertices.astype(np.float32),
278:             vertex_id_embedding.astype(np.float32),
279:             body_part_embedding.astype(np.float32),
280:             skinning_summary["summary"].astype(np.float32),
281:         ],
282:         axis=1,
283:     ).astype(np.float32)
284: 
285:     return {
286:         "vertex_features": static_vertex_features,
287:         "channel_names": static_channel_names,
288:         "rest_vertices": rest_vertices,
289:         "canonical_positions": normalized_vertices.astype(np.float32),
290:         "canonical_normals": vertex_normals.astype(np.float32),
291:         "canonical_joints": normalized_joints.astype(np.float32),
292:         "vertex_id_embedding": vertex_id_embedding.astype(np.float32),
293:         "body_part_embedding": body_part_embedding.astype(np.float32),
294:         "vertex_body_part_ids": vertex_body_part_ids.astype(np.int64),
295:         "joint_body_part_ids": joint_body_part_ids.astype(np.int64),
296:         "dominant_joint_ids": dominant_joint_ids.astype(np.int64),
297:         "skinning_summary": skinning_summary["summary"].astype(np.float32),
298:         "weighted_joint_centroid": skinning_summary["weighted_joint_centroid"].astype(np.float32),
299:         "top1_weight": skinning_summary["top1_weight"].astype(np.float32),
300:         "top2_weight": skinning_summary["top2_weight"].astype(np.float32),
301:         "weight_entropy": skinning_summary["weight_entropy"].astype(np.float32),
302:         "canonical_scale": np.asarray(scale, dtype=np.float32),
303:         "channel_groups": {
304:             "canonical_positions": list(range(0, 3)),
305:             "vertex_id_embedding": list(range(3, 3 + int(vertex_id_dim))),
306:             "body_part_embedding": list(
307:                 range(3 + int(vertex_id_dim), 3 + int(vertex_id_dim) + int(body_part_dim))
308:             ),
309:             "skinning_summary": list(
310:                 range(
311:                     3 + int(vertex_id_dim) + int(body_part_dim),
312:                     3 + int(vertex_id_dim) + int(body_part_dim) + len(SKINNING_SUMMARY_CHANNELS),
313:                 )
314:             ),
315:         },
316:     }
317: 
318: 
319: def compute_pose_aligned_vertex_features(
320:     world_vertices: np.ndarray,
321:     faces: np.ndarray,
322:     canonical_positions: np.ndarray,
323:     world_to_cam: np.ndarray,
324:     normalization_scale: float | np.ndarray,
325: ) -> dict[str, np.ndarray]:
326:     world_vertices = np.asarray(world_vertices, dtype=np.float32)
327:     faces = np.asarray(faces, dtype=np.int32)
328:     canonical_positions = np.asarray(canonical_positions, dtype=np.float32)
329:     rotation = np.asarray(world_to_cam[:3, :3], dtype=np.float32)
330:     translation = np.asarray(world_to_cam[:3, 3], dtype=np.float32)
331: 
332:     world_normals = compute_vertex_normals(world_vertices, faces)
333:     cam_vertices = world_vertices @ rotation.T + translation[None, :]
334:     cam_normals = _safe_normalize(world_normals @ rotation.T).astype(np.float32)
335: 
336:     scale = float(np.asarray(normalization_scale, dtype=np.float32))
337:     if not np.isfinite(scale) or scale < 1e-8:
338:         scale = 1.0
339:     normalized_cam_vertices = (cam_vertices / scale).astype(np.float32)
340: 
341:     return {
342:         "canonical_positions": canonical_positions.astype(np.float32),
343:         "normalized_cam_vertices": normalized_cam_vertices,
344:         "cam_normals": cam_normals.astype(np.float32),
345:     }
346: 
347: 
348: def build_surface_cluster_ids(canonical_positions: np.ndarray, num_clusters: int) -> tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray]:
349:     canonical_positions = np.asarray(canonical_positions, dtype=np.float32)
350:     num_vertices = canonical_positions.shape[0]
351:     if num_vertices == 0:
352:         raise ValueError("canonical_positions must contain at least one vertex.")
353: 
354:     num_clusters = max(1, min(int(num_clusters), num_vertices))
355:     anchor_indices = np.zeros((num_clusters,), dtype=np.int64)
356:     distances = np.full((num_vertices,), np.inf, dtype=np.float32)
357: 
358:     centroid = canonical_positions.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True)
359:     farthest_idx = int(np.argmax(np.linalg.norm(canonical_positions - centroid, axis=1)))
360:     for cluster_idx in range(num_clusters):
361:         anchor_indices[cluster_idx] = farthest_idx
362:         anchor = canonical_positions[farthest_idx]
363:         sq_dists = np.sum((canonical_positions - anchor[None, :]) ** 2, axis=1).astype(np.float32)
364:         distances = np.minimum(distances, sq_dists)
365:         farthest_idx = int(np.argmax(distances))
366: 
367:     anchor_positions = canonical_positions[anchor_indices]
368:     sq_distances = np.sum(
369:         (canonical_positions[:, None, :] - anchor_positions[None, :, :]) ** 2,
370:         axis=2,
371:     ).astype(np.float32)
372:     cluster_ids = np.argmin(sq_distances, axis=1).astype(np.int64)
373:     return anchor_indices, cluster_ids
374: 
375: 
376: def pool_vertex_features(vertex_features: np.ndarray, cluster_ids: np.ndarray, num_clusters: int) -> np.ndarray:
377:     vertex_features = np.asarray(vertex_features, dtype=np.float32)
378:     cluster_ids = np.asarray(cluster_ids, dtype=np.int64).reshape(-1)
379:     num_clusters = max(1, int(num_clusters))
380:     pooled = np.zeros((num_clusters, vertex_features.shape[1]), dtype=np.float32)
381:     for cluster_idx in range(num_clusters):
382:         mask = cluster_ids == cluster_idx
383:         if not np.any(mask):
384:             continue
385:         pooled[cluster_idx] = vertex_features[mask].mean(axis=0).astype(np.float32)
386:     return pooled.astype(np.float32)
387: 
388: 
389: def _compute_skinning_transforms(
390:     rot_mats: np.ndarray,
391:     joints: np.ndarray,
392:     parents: np.ndarray,
393: ) -> tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray]:
394:     num_joints = int(joints.shape[0])
395:     relative_joints = joints.copy()
396:     for joint_idx in range(1, num_joints):
397:         parent_idx = int(parents[joint_idx])
398:         relative_joints[joint_idx] -= joints[parent_idx]
399: 
400:     global_transforms = np.zeros((num_joints, 4, 4), dtype=np.float32)
401:     for joint_idx in range(num_joints):
402:         local_transform = _make_transform(rot_mats[joint_idx], relative_joints[joint_idx])
403:         parent_idx = int(parents[joint_idx])
404:         if parent_idx < 0:
405:             global_transforms[joint_idx] = local_transform
406:         else:
407:             global_transforms[joint_idx] = global_transforms[parent_idx] @ local_transform
408: 
409:     rest_transforms = np.repeat(np.eye(4, dtype=np.float32)[None, :, :], num_joints, axis=0)
410:     rest_transforms[:, :3, 3] = -joints
411:     skinning_transforms = global_transforms @ rest_transforms
412:     posed_joints = global_transforms[:, :3, 3].astype(np.float32)
413:     return skinning_transforms.astype(np.float32), posed_joints
414: 
415: 
416: def forward_smplx_mesh(
417:     model_path: str | Path,
418:     betas: np.ndarray,
419:     fullpose: np.ndarray,
420:     transl: np.ndarray | None = None,
421:     expression: np.ndarray | None = None,
422:     scale: float | np.ndarray = 1.0,
